subcodes.first_line: O thou who drinkest from the Salsabíl of divine favor! May the light of God illumine thy brow with the radiance of bliss amidst the faces of all peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شارب سلسبیل عنایت الهی نور الله جبینک بنضره النعیم بین وجوه العالمین قد تشرف
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
